# My Project

This is the overview of the project.

## Installation

```bash
npm install my-project
```

## Usage

### Basic Usage

```javascript
import { foo } from 'my-project';
foo();
```

### Advanced Usage

You can configure options:

```javascript
import { foo } from 'my-project';
foo({ verbose: true });
```

## API Reference

### `foo(options?)`

Runs the main function.

| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| options | object | Optional config |
